name: Chili Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans 16 oz S&W Chili Makin's (or any other premade, low-fat, vegetarian chili)
6 oz bag of baked corn chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the chili, corn chips, and cheese in a baking dish.
2. Heat in the oven at 350°F or 375°F until the cheese is melted and the chili is warmed through.
3. Serve with additional corn chips if desired.
(For those who have dietary restrictions or preferences, you may add one box/package of prepared Heartline Meatless Meats to the chili before layering for a delicious, meat-free option.)
